site.name: Lydia Zhigmitova
site.tagline: Verified research and data, kept current.
site.description: Human-verified research and data services — every fact checked, dated, and kept current.
site.author: Lydia Zhigmitova

about.intro: I help businesses replace AI guesses and stale spreadsheets with research that has been checked by a human — and kept current on a schedule.
about.mission: Deliver verified facts with dated proof, then keep them accurate as the world changes.

values.title: Accuracy
values.description: Every row, price, and contact is confirmed before it reaches you

values.title: Proof
values.description: Dated screenshots, bounce reports, and timestamps back every claim

values.title: Currency
values.description: Data goes stale fast — keeping it current is the real service

values.title: Clarity
values.description: Short reports on what changed, not walls of unchecked data

about.experience: Focused on verified research, lead lists, competitor pricing, and catalog work for online stores and small agencies.

faq.question: How do engagements usually work?
faq.answer: Most clients start with a fixed-price project — a price check, lead list, research brief, or catalog audit. Every project ends with a note on what will already be out of date in 30–90 days. From there, many move to a monthly retainer to keep the data current.

faq.question: How long does a project take?
faq.answer: Typical turnaround is a few business days once scope is clear. I’ll confirm timing when you book. Retainers run month-to-month on a fixed schedule.

faq.question: What do you guarantee?
faq.answer: Bounced emails are replaced free. Every price is backed by a dated screenshot. Mistakes are fixed free or refunded. On Price Watch: if a tracked competitor changes price and it’s missing from that month’s report, that month is free. I don’t guarantee sales, conversions, or rankings — only that the data is accurate and on time.

faq.question: Are retainers locked in?
faq.answer: No. Retainers are month-to-month with no lock-in contract. You can cancel any time. Billing is simple and predictable at a fixed monthly price.

Missed change in a tracked price → that month free
